summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GuessIt football prediction app search functionality and WebSocket connections. All backend search APIs working correctly, frontend search UI functional with proper highlighting and results display. WebSocket live updates active and working.
passed_tests: Search API: GET /api/football/search?q=real returns matches with 'real' in team names
Search API: GET /api/football/search?q=champions returns matches from Champions League
Search API: GET /api/football/search?q=barcelona returns Barcelona matches
Search API: Case-insensitive - GET /api/football/search?q=SERIE returns Serie A matches
Search API: GET /api/football/search?q=x returns empty results (short query rejected)
Frontend search: Click search icon opens search input correctly
Frontend search: Type 'real' shows 6 results with highlighted text
Frontend search: Search results show status badges (Live/Upcoming/FT)
Homepage loads with matches visible in grid view (42 match cards found)
Homepage shows 'Live updates active' indicator with WebSocket connection
Match data includes proper status display and team information
Tab navigation works correctly (Top Matches, Popular, Top Live tabs)
System health endpoints working (health, root API, system metrics)
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (search working, minor DOM attachment issue during extended testing)
